overall.description: A first-person walk along a futuristic industrial waterfront in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves from a corporate tower area past a large docked cargo ship and under massive gantry cranes, with golden hour sunlight creating warm reflections on the water and industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate waterfront promenade with tower complex

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with corporate towers to the left

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with corporate logos extending over the water on concrete pillars
wide concrete walkway with white painted lines along the water's edge
calm harbor water reflecting the sky and distant structures
futuristic cityscape visible across the water under partly cloudy skies

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a corporate waterfront promenade with distinctive towers rising on the left. The camera walks forward along the concrete dock, with open water to the right and a distant city skyline visible across the harbor under warm golden hour light.

events.description: transition from corporate promenade to industrial dock area with smokestacks visible in distance
sun comes into direct view creating strong golden glare and lens flare on the water surface

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while turning slightly right toward the industrial area and setting sun

entered.detail: large red and white industrial cargo vessel docked at the pier
massive industrial facility with multiple smokestacks silhouetted against the sun
tall industrial chimneys emitting faint smoke
large yellow industrial gantry cranes spanning the dock area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from corporate to industrial waterfront as the camera turns toward the setting sun. A large cargo ship comes into view on the right, while massive gantry cranes and industrial smokestacks dominate the distant skyline. Strong golden hour lighting creates dramatic glare on the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship docking pier with overhead crane structures

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the large cargo ship, passing under the gantry crane structures

entered.detail: weathered industrial warehouses with ventilation units and metal siding

segments.scene_description: Walking along the dock with the massive cargo ship towering on the right and industrial buildings on the left. The camera passes under the gantry cranes which begin to obscure the sky overhead. The ship's hull shows weathered red paint with white stripes and identification numbers.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cargo walkway under gantry crane corridor

events.description: passing the stern of the cargo ship, moving deeper into the crane-covered corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the industrial corridor, approaching distant figures ahead

notable_agents.action: small group of figures walking away in the distance under the cranes

entered.detail: small group of people visible walking ahead in the industrial corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the cargo ship, which now appears on the left side, and continues through a narrow corridor formed by the ship and industrial buildings. Overhead gantry cranes create a rhythmic pattern of light and shadow. Distant pedestrians become visible walking ahead in the industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront that transforms from a polished corporate promenade into a towering industrial zone. It begins by walking forward along a concrete dock beside sleek corporate towers, with the distant city skyline shimmering across the harbor under warm golden hour light. As the camera turns toward the setting sun, the environment shifts toward an industrial landscape where a massive cargo ship emerges on the right and gantry cranes dominate the horizon amidst a dramatic golden glare. The scene then tightens as the camera passes under the overhead cranes and alongside the weathered red hull of the ship, which begins to obscure the sky. Finally, the camera moves past the vessel into a narrow corridor of industrial buildings, where the gantry cranes create a rhythmic pattern of light and shadow over distant pedestrians walking ahead.
